data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of time-limited offers expiring in 2 hours. However, the evidence does not confirm that the system implements this expiration mechanism effectively. The linked use case mentions time-limited offers, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the actual implementation of the expiration feature, leading to a clear gap in the requirement validation.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation of time-limited offers expiring in 2 hours.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
